description_long: This is a compact, four-door sedan with a boxy, vintage design reminiscent of Eastern European cars from the late 20th century. The car features a bright red exterior with visible signs of wear, including scratches, dents, and rust patches along the lower panels and wheel arches. The windows are large and slightly tinted, and the wheels are simple with hubcaps that show some dirt and aging. The front of the car has dual round headlights and a black grille, while the rear displays rectangular taillights and a black license plate with white text. The overall build suggests a steel body with glass windows and rubber tires, and the car is designed to accommodate passengers in an urban environment.
description: A vintage red four-door sedan with visible wear, rust, and a boxy design, featuring round headlights and rectangular taillights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, four doors, rust patches, and worn wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rectangular taillights, black license plate, and large rear window.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, similar wear and rust as the left side, and all four doors.
description_view_3: Front view displaying dual round headlights, a black grille, and the front license plate.
attribute_headlight_design: dual round headlights, horizontally aligned, classic style
